name: Aloe Cooling Gel
description: A lightweight aloe gel that calms sun-warmed skin, hydrates quickly, and leaves a fresh non-sticky finish.

name: Reef Safe Sunscreen SPF 50
description: Broad-spectrum mineral sunscreen built for long beach days, pool sessions, and bright city errands.

name: Woven Beach Tote
description: A roomy, structured tote for towels, sunscreen, books, water bottles, and the little extras summer asks for.

name: Citrus Hydration Bottle
description: A double-wall bottle that keeps drinks cold during hikes, picnics, workouts, and hot commutes.

name: Linen Sun Hat
description: A breathable linen-blend hat with a soft brim for shade that still packs easily in a weekend bag.

name: Portable Mist Fan
description: A compact rechargeable fan with a fine mist setting for outdoor markets, festivals, patios, and travel.
